race.description: Harvey Norman The Lamont Classic Hcp
race.comment: STAR OF LILY (1)chased a pair of smart ones to the line in a strong maiden at Canberra before spelling. Franked the form fresh with a dominant win at Moruya. Thrown straight in the deep end last start when sent to town where she had excuses after racing wide throughout. Much better placed here and is a great chance to atone. ANDRES GIRL (6) was denied by the barest of margins on debut at Albury. Better for that and will appreciate the added trip. In the mix. MR PEASANT (5) returns a gelding for the Murray camp and looks better placed stepping out to the 1200m. Draws the inside pillar with JVO booked. Watching. SUNQUIST (8) is a The Autumn Sun filly on debut for the Todd Smart. Trialled well on the Acton in readiness and is one to keep safe.
